posts.author: balanagendra (balanagendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

Good day,

As you can see in the below image, I have duplicate recipes. I want to delete the duplicate recipes, but I don’t have the option to remove the recipe.

You can see the below recording video as well.

image1690×807 139 KB

How can i delete this duplicate recipe, Help us on this, @TeamSoftware

Thanks in advance

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @balanagendra,

Would you be able to please fill this form (https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=13855862562962) adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, board IDs, item IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: balanagendra (balanagendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday,

Now that I am able to delete, I am not sure why it happened.

Thanks for the response.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @balanagendra,

I am glad that is the case

Let us know if you need anything!
